name: GOLFTEC Buckhead
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and club fitting company that provides data-based lessons using advanced motion measurement technology and high-speed video analysis. Their instruction is built on personalized game plans created by expert coaches after a Swing Evaluation, which identifies key areas for improvement and provides custom drills. The company also offers club fitting services using launch monitors and shaft optimization, alongside the sale of golf equipment from top brands at competitive prices. GOLFTEC emphasizes a structured improvement path through a combination of lessons, practice memberships, and on-course coaching, focusing on measurable results like increased distance and lower scores.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors for precise feedback
Structured improvement plan with personalized coaching for long-term progress
Comprehensive services including lessons, club fitting, and practice all in one location

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on website
No alcohol service mentioned on website

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and options for purchase. They offer club fitting services to help you find the perfect clubs for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink service policies, so it is recommended to contact the specific location directly for details on outside food and beverage policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While the website mentions virtual practice environments, it does not specify typical timeframes for an 18-hole simulation. Duration would likely depend on the virtual software and simulator setup used.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers instruction for juniors and youth, making it a suitable environment for young golfers to learn and improve their game with age-appropriate coaching.
